Washington Post coverage of the parallel US-Dutch action against Michael Rahim Mohammed (Mr. Dark), operator of the Dark Scandals site, with detail on the international coordination among DOJ, the Dutch National Police, Europol, and the German Federal Criminal Police (BKA).

## Extracted Summary
